svg.title: Guangzhou Metro Map in London Style (2019)

g.text: 海珠有軌電車THZ1沿途各站

Line 3 is a through service from Panyu Square, via this station, terminating at Tianhe Coach Terminal. - Line 3 train from Airport N. stops service at this station. Passengers for Panyu Square should change train at this station.
Station is not yet in use.
Station is not yet in use.
Passengers for Guangzhou North Railway Station should alight at Huacheng Lu.
從番禺廣場開出的3號綫列車為直通車， 駛經本站，並以天河客運站為終點站。 - 從機場北開出的3號綫列車以本站為終 點站。往番禺廣場的乘客，請在本站轉 車。
往廣州火車北站的乘客，請於花城路落 車。
